channel.title: STS Collective on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in STS Collective on simeononsecurity

item.title: DagShell Custom Firmware for Orbic RCL400: Complete Installation and Usage Guide 2026
item.category: "Custom Firmware" , "Mobile Security" , "Privacy Tools" , "Network Security" , "Wardriving" , "Penetration Testing" , "IoT Hacking" , "Security Research" , "Hardware Hacking" , "Privacy Technology"
item.description: Comprehensive guide to DagShell custom firmware for Orbic RCL400 hotspot including installation, privacy tools, hacking features, wardriving capabilities, and why it pairs perfectly with RayHunter for mobile security research.

item.title: Flock-You Detection Project: Complete Counter-Surveillance Hardware and Setup Guide 2026
item.category: "Security Hardware" , "Counter Surveillance" , "Privacy Technology" , "Open Source Projects" , "ESP32 Development" , "WiFi Monitoring" , "Privacy Tools" , "Digital Rights" , "Hardware Hacking" , "Network Security"
item.description: Comprehensive technical guide to the open-source Flock-You project for detecting Flock Safety ALPR cameras using ESP32-based hardware. Includes setup instructions, firmware details, and purchasing options.
